_publications._publicationTitle: Transplanting neurofibromatosis-1 gene knockout neural stem cells improve functional recovery in rats with spinal cord injury by enhancing the mTORC2 pathway.

_contextSnippet: Compared with that in the SCI+LV-vector NSC group, the number of FG-positive neurons in the SCI+LV-NF-1 NSC group was significantly higher
details: Successfully performed retrograde tracing, showing significantly higher number of FG-positive neurons in SCI+LV-NF-1 NSC group compared to SCI+LV-vector NSC group at T8 level
